/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/run.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run.dir/graph_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run.dir/kernel.cu.o CMakeFiles/run.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o run   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
